category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tdl as a Telegram toolkit written in Golang.
source_facts.description says it is a Telegram Messenger downloader/tools project written in Go.
display_name_sources: Official repository is iyear/tdl and describes the project as tdl.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official tdl documentation site at docs.iyear.me/tdl.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/iyear/tdl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository topics and description identify Telegram, downloader, Go, and CLI/toolkit usage.
